message:
fix: remove hardcoded go test default from formula and config

The formula runner defaulted test_command to "go test ./..." in three places,
causing non-Go rigs to run the wrong test command. Changed all defaults to
empty string — rigs must set test_command explicitly for their language.

Cherry-picked from PR #2519.

Co-authored-by: Chris Deal <DreadPirateRobertz@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1224,7 +1224,7 @@ func DefaultMergeQueueConfig() *MergeQueueConfig {
 		IntegrationBranchRefineryEnabled: boolPtr(true),
 		OnConflict:                       OnConflictAssignBack,
 		RunTests:                         boolPtr(true),
-		TestCommand:                      "go test ./...",
+		TestCommand:                      "",
 		DeleteMergedBranches:             boolPtr(true),
 		RetryFlakyTests:                  1,
 		PollInterval:                     "30s",

@@ -117,8 +117,8 @@ description = "Lint command (e.g., eslint .). Empty = skip."
 default = ""
 
 [vars.test_command]
-description = "Test command to run (if run_tests is true)"
-default = "go test ./..."
+description = "Test command to run (if run_tests is true). Auto-detected from rig settings."
+default = ""
 
 [vars.build_command]
 description = "Build command (e.g., go build ./...). Empty = skip."
